perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a man in a yellow cap and khaki vest standing in a large parking lot, speaking excitedly to the camera with a giant ferris wheel in the background. (2) A woman wearing a black beret and a striped black-and-white dress joins him; they both gesture energetically with their hands while smiling. (3) Transitions show close-up shots of the colorful ferris wheel and the surrounding resort buildings. (4) The scene shifts to a studio-like setting where a female model showcases various merchandise, including a white t-shirt, a colorful insulated bag, and small cardholders. (5) Close-up product shots feature a round red pillow, a digital watch with a printed strap, and a blue mesh tote bag. (6) A detailed shot of a gold medal with a spinning center is shown. (7) The video returns to the man in the parking lot who points to the camera and gestures urgently to emphasize the final message.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic music starts immediately. A male voice speaks in a very high-pitched, enthusiastic, and fast-paced tone. (2) A female voice joins in with a similar high-energy, cheerful tone, creating a lively dialogue. (3) Wind noise is audible in the background during outdoor scenes. (4) Sound effects such as high-pitched pings and chime sounds accompany the appearance of text and transition graphics. (5) The music continues at a steady pace while the speakers describe product features, maintaining a high volume throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 第二屆 hahababy 路跑 (Functional: Event title, Excited tone). (2) 8/8 12:00 開始報名 (Functional: Registration info, Informative tone). (3) 12/20 12/21 (Functional: Event dates). (4) 台中麗寶樂園 (Functional: Location). (5) 演唱會 (Hook: Concert announcement). (6) 煙火秀 (Hook: Fireworks announcement). (7) 摩天輪燈光秀 (Hook: Light show info). (8) 衣服, 保冷袋, 卡套, 翻轉抱枕, 手燈手錶, 海灘包, 獎牌, 造型悠遊卡 (Functional: Merchandise labels). (9) 搶爆了 (Decorative: High demand warning). (10) 絕對會當機 (Decorative: System crash warning, Urgent tone).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Announcement -> Location/Event Details -> Merchandise Showcase -> Final Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator, 1 female creator, 1 female model for products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man wears a yellow baseball cap, a white t-shirt, and a khaki utility vest. The woman wears a black beret and a black-and-white striped dress with a black mesh skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An expansive asphalt parking lot adjacent to the Lihpao Resort, featuring a large blue ferris wheel and multicolored European-style buildings. Merchandise shots are taken against a clean white studio shelf background with colorful toys.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright natural sunlight and even studio lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Event Logistics -> Merchandise Showcase -> Scarcity Tactic
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and drive registrations for the second 'hahababy' themed fun run at Lihpao Resort by highlighting event activities and showcasing extensive exclusive merchandise packages.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct promotion of an event and brand merchandise owned by the creators.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature high-energy 'variety show' hosting style of the creators.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes classic marketing FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out) by explicitly stating that the registration system will likely crash, urging fans to act immediately.
